metrics.label: Facebook Views
metrics.description: Facebook content/page views reported by Lens when available.
metrics.caveat: Reach/impressions may use Meta media view proxies.

metrics.label: Unique Views Proxy
metrics.description: Unique media/page view proxy reported by Lens when available.
metrics.caveat: This is a unique views proxy, not confirmed classic reach.

metrics.label: Engagement
metrics.description: Visible engagement or page post engagement reported by Lens.

metrics.label: Post Count
metrics.description: Processed Facebook posts in the selected range.

metrics.label: Video Views
metrics.description: Facebook video views reported by Lens when available.

metrics.label: Followers
metrics.description: Facebook Page follower count when available.

metrics.label: Follower Growth
metrics.description: Follower growth from Lens if supplied or safely calculated upstream.

metrics.label: Link Clicks
metrics.description: Facebook link clicks from Lens if confirmed.

metrics.label: CTR
metrics.description: Facebook click-through rate from Lens if confirmed.
